task_description: Modularize LTX_PRO.py (8670 lines) into a proper Python package (ltx_pro/) with 18 modules, create a new StoryToVideo system for YouTube series production, and rewrite LTX_PRO.py as a thin ~500-800 line Colab orchestrator.

verification.summary: All 18 modules in ltx_pro/ pass py_compile. LTX_PRO.py (721 lines) passes py_compile. Package imports cleanly. All modules have __all__ exports. Config namespace propagation verified across pipeline/extended/storyboard modules. StoryToVideo class has all 16 required methods.
